prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing
search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an
item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST
125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit.

=== PRODUCT CONTEXT ===
SKU: SON-COLLAPSWATER-CARRIER-15L-IR-TT
Product Type: CARRIER_BAG_CASE
Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor
Existing Title: Collapsible Water Carrier Camping Emergency Bag 3.75 Gallon (15 Liter)
Description: ASR Outdoor introduces the survivor series collapsible semi-transparent water carrier bag made from high-quality material that is long-lasting durable, lightweight, and BPA-free. Our water carrier is semi-transparent so you can see the amount of water inside and expands when full. It has a collapsible design so you can fold it flat and easily store it in a backpack or bag. It comes with a convenient green carrying handle for easy lifting and pouring; There is also a valve and a red spigot to pour water. This water carrier allows you to collect, have, or store fresh water with you to keep you hydrated while camping, hiking, or outdoor adventure. Great for cooking, kitchens, picnics, road trips, and scouting. The capacity of this semi-transparent water carrier is 3.75 gallons or 15 liters. The dimension of the expanded carrier bag is 9 x 10 x 11.5 inches.
Search Terms: survivor series collapsible semitransparent water carrier bag carrying handle valve spigot container camping hiking durable lightweight bpa free expand backpack convenient lifting pouring hydrated cooking kitchens picnics carabiners squeeze storage
Features:
- COLLAPSIBLE DESIGN - ASR Outdoor emergency water carrier folds down flat for easy storage and transportation when not in use. Store it in your backpack, hiking gear or camping supplies to ensure access to clean water in an outdoor emergency situation
- CONVENIENT CARRY HANDLE - Water bag comes with top carry handle for easy lifting and pouring out in the field. Bag features a valve and red spigot to assist with pouring water while camping, hiking, backpacking and more
- LARGE CAPACITY - Each bag holds up to 3.75 gallons of water (15 liters); Dimension of the expanded carrier bag when filled with water is 9" x 10" x 11.5"; Collect, store and hold fresh water while camping, hiking and backpacking
- DURABLE LIGHTWEIGH CONSTRUCTION - Water carrier bag made from high-quality, BPA free plastic material that is safe for holding water for consumption. Semi-transparent material allows you to see the amount of water contained inside
- SPECIFICATIONS - Capacity: 3.75 gallons (15 liters); Expanded dimensions: 9" x 10" x 11.5"; Color: semi-transparent, green, red, black; Top carry handle; Material: BPA free plastic (safe for storing liquids for consumption)

=== ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) ===
Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title,
not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order:
  ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name}
- brand: use the catalog brand above.
- pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a
  dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent.
- size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS).
Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number.
Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters.
Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing

=== TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) ===
Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most
search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a
repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable").
Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the
highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point.
Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep
acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out
"&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And
International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are
allowed.
Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name.

=== RETURN ===
Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape:
{"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 15L Collapsible Water Carrier Bag

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 3.75-gal 15L Semi-Transparent Water Carrier Bag

anthropic.title_differentiation: 375 Gallon Capacity, BPA-Free, Semi-Transparent, Folds Flat, Carry Handle, Valve And Spigot

openai.title_differentiation: Collapsible Design, BPA-Free Plastic, Carry Handle, Valve And Red Spigot, Lightweight, Easy Storage
